Ella Lannister is a noblewoman of House Lannister of Lannisport.[N 1][2] It is currently unknown if she is still alive in the main series.

Contents

  • 1 History
  • 2 Family
  • 3 Notes
  • 4 References

History[ ]

Ella was married to Damon Lannister, and gave birth to Damon's son, Damion Lannister.[2]
